name: AgentOracle Native
description: Automated prediction task processing with privacy protection and WebSocket integration

api_base_url.label: API Base URL
api_base_url.help: AgentOracle platform API base URL, e.g. https://your-platform-domain.com

jitter_seconds.label: Jitter
jitter_seconds.help: Random jitter in seconds to avoid thundering herd (default: 60)

daily_report_enabled.label: Daily Report Enabled
daily_report_enabled.help: Enable automatic daily report generation (default: true)

daily_report_hour.label: Daily Report Hour
daily_report_hour.help: Hour of day for daily report (0-23, default: 2)

daily_report_minute.label: Daily Report Minute
daily_report_minute.help: Minute of hour for daily report (0-59, default: 0)
